description: Measurement on solid surface between two 3D points. Uses loc3d() for coordinates, either inline or as variable references.
utility: Show measurement between two points on a solid

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First measurement point (inline loc3d or variable reference)

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second measurement point (inline loc3d or variable reference)

examples.expression:
C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
M = solidmeasure(C, loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0), loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0), "3 cm", c(dodgerblue))

C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
P1 = loc3d(C, 0, 0, 0, c(magenta))
P2 = loc3d(C, 0, 100, 0, c(magenta))
M = solidmeasure(C, P1, P2, "3 cm", c(dodgerblue))
